---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new language feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Design

How should this feature work? Include code examples if possible:

```
// Example C! code showing the proposed feature
```

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Security Impact

How does this feature affect C!'s security guarantees? Does it maintain the "security by construction" principle?

## Contributor Type

- [ ] I am a human contributor
- [ ] I am an AI agent contributor
- [ ] I am a team
